title: A new family of solitons for nonlinear Schrödinger equations with non-vanishing boundary conditions in high dimension
summary: In space dimensions $N \geq 4$, we introduce a new minimization procedure to construct traveling wave solutions to nonlinear Schrödinger equations with non-vanishing boundary conditions at spatial infinity. We denote the family of solitons obtained using this construction by $\mathscr{J}$. Mariş (Ann. of Math. 178:107-182, 2013) obtained a family of solitons by minimizing the action functional subject to a Pohozaev constraint; we use $\mathscr{P}$ to denote this family of solitons. Chiron and Mariş (Arch. Rational Mech. Anal. 226:143-242, 2017) used minimizing energy at fixed momentum to obtain a family of solitons; we denote this family of solitons by $\mathscr{Q}$. We show that, under some conditions, we have $\mathscr{Q} \subset \mathscr{J} \subset \mathscr{P}$. In addition, we show that $\mathscr{P} \subset \mathscr{J}$ under specific conditions.

AI.tldr: 在N≥4维空间中，通过新的极小化程序构造非线性薛定谔方程的非零边界条件行波解，建立了三类孤立子集合的包含关系。
AI.motivation: 研究高维空间(N≥4)中非线性薛定谔方程的非零边界条件行波解构造问题，比较不同极小化方法得到的孤立子集合之间的关系。
AI.techniques: 新的极小化程序构造方法，与已有的Pohozaev约束极小化方法和固定动量能量极小化方法进行比较分析。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了三类孤立子集合的包含关系：在特定条件下有$\mathscr{Q} \subset \mathscr{J} \subset \mathscr{P}$，且在特定条件下有$\mathscr{P} \subset \mathscr{J}$。
AI.significance: 为高维非线性薛定谔方程的行波解提供了新的构造方法，揭示了不同极小化程序所得解集之间的数学关系，深化了对孤立子分类的理解。

title: Green representations and global Hölder continuity for solutions of elliptic equations
comment: arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2509.23064 by other authors
summary: Let $N\in\mathbb{N}$ and $u$ be a weak solution of equation $\displaystyle Lu\equiv - \sum_{i,j=1}^{N}\frac{\partial}{\partial x_{j}}(\frac{\partial u}{\partial x_{i}}b^{ij})= f$ in $Ω\subset \mathbb{R}^{N}$. We obtain functions $G$ and $H_{l}$ on $Ω\times Ω$ for every $l\in\{1,\cdots,N\}$ having following properties: if $f$ is in $L^{1}(Ω)$, then $\int_ΩG(x,y)f(x)dx = u(y)$, $\int_ΩH_{l}(x,y)f(x)dx = -\frac{\ \partial u}{\partial x_{l}}(y)\quad a.e~y\in Ω, \forall~l\in\{1,\cdots,N\}.$

AI.tldr: 构造了椭圆型方程弱解的格林函数及其导数核函数，建立了积分表示公式
AI.motivation: 研究二阶椭圆型偏微分方程弱解的积分表示问题，特别是当方程系数矩阵非对称且非正定时，如何构造格林函数及其导数核函数来表示解及其梯度
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、弱解理论、对偶性论证和积分表示技术，通过构造核函数G和H_l来建立解及其梯度的积分表示
AI.main_theorems: 对于定义在Ω⊂ℝ^N上的椭圆型方程Lu=f，当f∈L^1(Ω)时，存在核函数G(x,y)和H_l(x,y)使得u(y)=∫_Ω G(x,y)f(x)dx且∂u/∂x_l(y)=-∫_Ω H_l(x,y)f(x)dx几乎处处成立
AI.significance: 为椭圆型偏微分方程的弱解理论提供了新的积分表示工具，特别适用于系数矩阵非对称非正定的情形，为后续的正则性估计和数值分析提供了理论基础

title: Statistical Error Bounds for Generative Solvers of Chaotic PDEs: Wasserstein Stability, Generalization, and Turbulence
summary:
Statistical solutions of incompressible Euler describe turbulent dynamics as time-parameterized laws on $L^2$ whose multi-point correlations satisfy an infinite hierarchy of weak identities. Modern generative samplers for PDE forecasting (flow matching, rectified flows, diffusion via probability-flow ODEs) are measure-transport mechanisms and therefore induce Markov operators on laws. We develop a law-level analysis compatible with the correlation-measure framework of Lanthaler--Mishra--Parés-Pulido (LM): convergence in $d_T(μ,ν)=\int_{0}^{T} W_{1}\!\bigl(μ_t,ν_t\bigr)\,\mathrm{d}t$, compactness controlled by structure functions, and identification of limits through hierarchy identities.
  Quantitatively, we prove a $W_2$ stability estimate whose growth rate is a distance-weighted average strain under optimal couplings, and a one-step error decomposition into a resolved mismatch term and an unavoidable high-frequency coverage tail controlled by structure-function (spectral) bounds. These inputs propagate through multi-step rollouts via a discrete Grönwall recursion with amplification governed by the average-strain exponent rather than a worst-case Lipschitz constant. On the qualitative side, sampler-native path controls yield LM time regularity; together with uniform energy and structure-function bounds this gives precompactness in $d_T$ and strong convergence of LM-admissible observables. If hierarchy residuals vanish along a sequence, every limit is an LM statistical solution, with residuals bounded by training-native drift/score regression errors. Finally, we show how common finite-grid diagnostics--proper distributional scores and likelihood-style certificates--admit principled interpretations as resolved observables within the same statistical-solution framework.

AI.tldr: 建立了生成式采样器与统计解理论之间的桥梁，为湍流模拟提供了基于概率度量的收敛性分析框架
AI.motivation: 研究不可压缩欧拉方程的统计解描述湍流动力学，现代生成式采样器（流匹配、整流流、扩散模型）作为概率度量传输机制，需要建立与Lanthaler-Mishra-Parés-Pulido相关测度框架兼容的理论分析
AI.techniques: 使用相关测度框架、Wasserstein距离稳定性估计、离散Grönwall递归、结构函数（谱）边界控制、训练原生漂移/得分回归误差分析
AI.main_theorems: 证明了W₂稳定性估计、一步误差分解为可解析失配项和高频覆盖尾项、d_T度量下的预紧致性、LM统计解的收敛性、训练误差与层次残差的定量关系
AI.significance: 为基于生成式模型的湍流模拟提供了严格的数学基础，建立了采样器性能与统计解理论之间的桥梁，为评估有限网格诊断提供了原则性解释框架

title: Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle on half spaces and Orthants: Best constants, Optimizers and Stability
summary: Though the sharp Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle has been extensively studied in the entire Euclidean spaces, the counterpart on the half spaces or more general orthants has been missing in the literature. We investigate the sharp Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle on orthants by computing explicitly the optimal constant and determining all possible extremal functions. Moreover, we establish several stability estimates of the Heisenberg Uncertainty Principle on the half spaces and orthants.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了正交象限上尖锐的海森堡不确定性原理，计算了最优常数并确定了所有可能的极值函数。
AI.motivation: 海森堡不确定性原理在整个欧几里得空间中已被广泛研究，但在半空间或更一般的正交象限上的对应原理在文献中缺失，需要填补这一空白。
AI.techniques: 通过显式计算最优常数，确定极值函数，并建立稳定性估计的分析方法。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 正交象限上尖锐海森堡不确定性原理的最优常数显式计算；2. 所有可能极值函数的确定；3. 半空间和正交象限上海森堡不确定性原理的多个稳定性估计。
AI.significance: 将经典的海森堡不确定性原理从整个空间推广到具有边界的区域，为量子力学、调和分析和偏微分方程在有界区域上的研究提供了理论基础。

title: Steady states and dynamics of a higher dimensional thin film equation
summary: We study a higher-dimensional thin film equation that incorporates competitive effects between aggregation and repulsion, where repulsion is modeled by fourth-order diffusion and aggregation by backward second-order degenerate diffusion, with a degenerate diffusion exponent $m>0$. We first conduct a systematic analysis of the existence and geometric properties of steady-state solutions for all $m>0$, revealing a critical threshold $m^*=(d+2)/(d-2)$ for variational compactness and solution structure. For $0 < m < m^*$, we then prove that, under natural regularity constraints, radially decreasing steady states coincide with both the extremals of the Gagliardo-Nirenberg-Sobolev inequality and the global minimizers of the free energy. Moreover, we establish the uniqueness of such steady states for $m \neq 1 + 2/d$. Furthermore, in the supercritical regime $1 + 2/d < m < m^*$, we identify a sharp threshold given by the $L^{m+1}$ norm of the unique radial steady-state solution, which distinguishes between global existence for initial data below the threshold and finite-time blow-up for initial data above the threshold. The main contribution of this work is to use steady-state solutions as a theoretical pivot to construct a unified analytical framework that connects parameter classification, variational structure and dynamic behavior. This framework elucidates how the regularity barrier prevents infinite energy descent and selects stable equilibrium states, and thus predicts the global evolution of the system, thereby providing a unified variational principle for understanding steady-state selection and dynamic bifurcations in such higher-order degenerate diffusion equations.

AI.tldr: 建立了高阶退化扩散方程中稳态解作为理论枢纽的统一分析框架，连接参数分类、变分结构和动态行为
AI.motivation: 研究包含聚集（二阶退化扩散）和排斥（四阶扩散）竞争效应的高维薄膜方程，探索稳态解的存在性、几何性质及其与系统全局演化的关系
AI.techniques: 系统分析稳态解的存在性和几何性质；利用Gagliardo-Nirenberg-Sobolev不等式极值；变分方法分析自由能全局极小值；建立尖锐阈值条件区分全局存在性和有限时间爆破
AI.main_theorems: 1) 发现临界阈值m*=(d+2)/(d-2)决定变分紧致性和解结构；2) 证明径向递减稳态解与GNS不等式极值及自由能全局极小值一致；3) 建立m≠1+2/d时稳态解的唯一性；4) 在超临界区域识别基于L^{m+1}范数的尖锐阈值，区分全局存在性和有限时间爆破
AI.significance: 为高阶退化扩散方程提供了统一的变分原理，阐明了正则性障碍如何阻止无限能量下降并选择稳定平衡态，预测系统全局演化，理解稳态选择和动态分岔

title: Slow-fast system in Rosales-Majda combustion model with fractional order kinetics
summary: We consider traveling wave solutions of a one-dimensional model for detonation waves derived by Rosales and Majda, when the reaction order $α$ belongs to $[0,1)$. The chemical kinetics is a simplified Arrhenius law or a Heaviside function. The model in the reaction zone is a slow-fast dynamical system for a vector representing temperature and mass fraction, which depends on the velocity $c$ and small viscosity $β$. Our goal in this paper is to study the bifurcation diagram in the $(β,c)$ parameter space and identify the nature of the trajectories corresponding to viscous shock waves. The demonstrations are based on a variety of techniques including the Poincaré-Bendixson theorem and the Fenichel theory. Theoretical results are confirmed by numerical computations.

AI.tldr: 研究一维爆轰波模型中行波解在反应阶数α∈[0,1)时的分岔图及其轨迹性质
AI.motivation: 分析由Rosales和Majda提出的一维爆轰波模型，研究当化学反应阶数α在[0,1)范围内时，行波解在参数空间(β,c)中的分岔行为，其中β是小粘性系数，c是波速
AI.techniques: 使用Poincaré-Bendixson定理和Fenichel理论分析慢快动力系统，结合数值计算验证理论结果
AI.main_theorems: 建立了(β,c)参数空间中的分岔图，识别了对应于粘性冲击波的轨迹性质，分析了简化Arrhenius定律和Heaviside函数两种化学动力学模型
AI.significance: 为爆轰波理论提供了严格的数学分析框架，揭示了反应区慢快动力系统的复杂动力学行为，对理解爆轰波传播机制有重要理论意义

title: Partial regularity in nonlocal systems II
summary: Solutions to nonlinear nonlocal systems of order $2s>1$ in $\mathbb{R}^n$ are $C^{1,α}$, for every $α<2s-1$, outside a closed singular set whose Hausdorff dimension is less than $n-2$, and which is empty when $n=2$.

AI.tldr: 证明了非线性非局部系统在$\mathbb{R}^n$中的解在奇异集外具有$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性，其中奇异集的Hausdorff维数小于$n-2$。
AI.motivation: 研究非线性非局部系统（阶数$2s>1$）解的正则性理论，特别是奇异集的结构和维数估计，这是非局部椭圆方程正则性理论的重要问题。
AI.techniques: 非局部椭圆方程理论、Hausdorff维数估计、奇异集分析、$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性估计、De Giorgi-Nash-Moser型方法在非局部情形下的推广。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 解在奇异集外具有$C^{1,\alpha}$正则性，其中$\alpha<2s-1$；2. 奇异集的Hausdorff维数小于$n-2$；3. 当$n=2$时奇异集为空集。
AI.significance: 扩展了非局部椭圆方程的正则性理论，为高阶非局部系统提供了精细的奇异集维数估计，对理解非局部偏微分方程解的奇异性结构有重要意义。

title: Multiple positive bound states for NLS equations on noncompact metric graphs with an attractive potential
summary: In this paper, we establish the existence of bounded states and geometrically distinct solutions for the subcritical NLS equation with attractive potential on metric graphs $\mathcal{G}$ when the mass $μ$ is large enough.We show that the NLS equation exists at least as many bound states of mass $μ$ as the number of bounded edges of $\mathcal{G}$ if the attractive potential satisfies some suitable assumptions.It is worth noting that this is different from the case of ground state, which on some graphs may fail to exist for every value of $μ$.

AI.tldr: 证明了在质量足够大时，带有吸引势能的亚临界NLS方程在度量图上存在有界态和几何不同的解
AI.motivation: 研究度量图（metric graphs）上带有吸引势能的亚临界非线性薛定谔方程（NLS）的有界态存在性问题。与基态（ground state）不同，在某些图上基态可能对所有质量值都不存在，因此需要研究更一般的解的存在性。
AI.techniques: 使用变分方法、临界点理论，以及度量图上的分析技术。通过构造合适的测试函数和利用吸引势能的特性来证明解的存在性。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：当质量μ足够大时，NLS方程存在至少与图的有界边数量一样多的有界态（bound states）。这些解是几何不同的（geometrically distinct），即不能通过对称性相互转化。
AI.significance: 扩展了度量图上NLS方程解的存在性理论，特别是对于非基态解的研究。揭示了图拓扑结构（有界边数量）与解的多重性之间的深刻联系，为量子图和非线性波动力学提供了新的理论结果。

title: A unified duality framework for barotropic, quantum and Korteweg fluids
summary: We investigate a dual variational formulation, in the spirit of Brenier, for several compressible fluid models: the compressible barotropic Euler system, the quantum Euler system, and the Euler-Korteweg system. We identify a unified abstract framework encompassing all three systems, which enables a simultaneous analysis. By introducing time-adaptive weights, we establish the consistency of the duality scheme on large time intervals. We prove the existence of variational dual solutions to the corresponding Cauchy problems for continuous, vacuum-free initial data in spaces of finite Radon measures, and establish the absence of a duality gap. As an application, we formulate and prove a 'Dafermos principle' for these models: no subsolution can dissipate the total entropy earlier or at a faster rate than the corresponding strong solution on its interval of existence. We also discuss connections between our abstract consistency result and Brenier's shock-free substitutes for entropy solutions of Burgers' equation.

AI.tldr: 论文通过引入时间自适应权重的对偶变分框架，统一分析了三种可压缩流体模型，建立了无对偶间隙的变分解存在性，并证明了这些模型的Dafermos原理。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是建立可压缩流体模型（包括可压缩正压Euler系统、量子Euler系统和Euler-Korteweg系统）的统一对偶变分框架，解决大时间区间上的对偶方案一致性问题，并探索这些模型的Dafermos原理。
AI.techniques: 主要技术包括：Brenier风格的对偶变分公式、时间自适应权重方法、有限Radon测度空间分析、抽象一致性框架、无对偶间隙证明，以及Dafermos原理的变分表述。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1）建立了包含三种流体模型的统一抽象框架；2）证明了对偶方案在大时间区间上的一致性；3）证明了在有限Radon测度空间中连续无真空初始数据的变分对偶解存在性；4）建立了无对偶间隙；5）证明了对这些模型的Dafermos原理。
AI.significance: 理论意义：为可压缩流体模型提供了统一的变分分析框架，将Brenier的对偶方法推广到更广泛的流体系统，建立了Dafermos原理的变分表述，并与Burgers方程的熵解无激波替代建立了联系。

title: A generalized Helmholtz-type decomposition of symmetric tensor fields and applications to ray transforms
summary: We study a solenoidal-potential type decomposition of a symmetric $m$-tensor field in $\Rb^2$, and its implications to injectivity questions for the momentum and elastic ray transforms. For symmetric tensor fields, a general decomposition with a restriction on the dimension and order of the decomposition was proved in~\cite{Rohit_Suman}. We extend the result to dimension $2$ under a mean-zero assumption. We use the decomposition in $2$ dimensions to prove the injectivity of the momentum and elastic ray transforms. We also prove a connection between the two integral transforms for $2$-tensors.

AI.tldr: 将对称m-张量场分解为螺线管-势能型，并应用于动量与弹性射线变换的注入性证明
AI.motivation: 研究二维空间中对称m-张量场的分解问题，解决动量射线变换和弹性射线变换的注入性问题，这些变换在断层成像和材料科学中有重要应用
AI.techniques: 螺线管-势能型分解方法，利用平均值为零的假设，建立动量变换与弹性变换之间的联系
AI.main_theorems: 1) 在二维空间中对称张量场的分解定理（需满足平均值为零条件）；2) 动量射线变换的注入性证明；3) 弹性射线变换的注入性证明；4) 二阶张量两种积分变换之间的关系
AI.significance: 扩展了Rohit和Suman的分解结果到二维情况，为断层成像中的反问题提供了理论基础，建立了动量与弹性射线变换之间的数学联系

title: Mathematical analysis for a doubly degenerate parabolic equation: Application to the Richards equation
summary: This paper presents a mathematical analysis of a doubly degenerate parabolic equation and its application to the Richards equation using a bounded auxiliary variable. We establish the existence of weak solutions using semi-implicit time discretization combined with maximal monotone operator theory. The analysis is conducted within weighted Sobolev spaces, allowing for a rigorous treatment of the equation's strict degeneracy and strong nonlinearities. A key feature of this study is the derivation of convergence results without imposing strictly positive lower bounds on the diffusivity or requiring high regularity of the solution. Furthermore, we prove that the Richards equation using the introduced auxiliary variable preserves the physical bounds of the saturation and demonstrate the unconditional linear convergence of the L-scheme linearization to the semi-discrete solution.

AI.tldr: 建立了具有严格退化性和强非线性双重退化抛物方程弱解的存在性，并将其应用于Richards方程，通过有界辅助变量方法获得收敛结果
AI.motivation: 研究双重退化抛物方程（特别是Richards方程）的数学分析，解决严格退化性和强非线性带来的挑战，避免对扩散系数施加严格正下界或高正则性要求
AI.techniques: 半隐式时间离散化结合极大单调算子理论，加权Sobolev空间框架，L-格式线性化方法，有界辅助变量技术
AI.main_theorems: 建立了弱解的存在性，证明了Richards方程保持饱和度的物理界，展示了L-格式线性化到半离散解的无条件线性收敛性
AI.significance: 为处理严格退化抛物方程提供了新的分析框架，在土壤水文学中的Richards方程应用具有实际意义，收敛结果不依赖传统正则性假设

title: Symmetry and Approximate Symmetry for Solutions of Mixed Local-Nonlocal Singular Equations
summary: In this article, we establish radial symmetry for positive weak solutions of a class of mixed local-nonlocal equations with possibly singular nonlinearity via the moving plane method. Furthermore, we provide a quantitative version of Gidas-Ni-Nirenberg type theorem for mixed local-nonlocal equations. To this regard, we establish a weak Harnack-type inequality and an analogue of the Alexandroff-Bakelman-Pucci inequality in the mixed nonhomogeneous setting with a lower order term, which appear to be new. To the best of our knowledge, this paper initiates the study of the quantitative properties of solutions to mixed problems.

AI.tldr: 建立了混合局部-非局部方程正弱解的径向对称性，并给出了Gidas-Ni-Nirenberg型定理的定量版本
AI.motivation: 研究混合局部-非局部方程（包含可能奇异的非线性项）的定性性质，特别是正解的对称性，这是混合问题定量性质研究的开端
AI.techniques: 移动平面法、弱Harnack型不等式、混合非齐次设置下的Alexandroff-Bakelman-Pucci不等式类比、包含低阶项的定量估计
AI.main_theorems: 1. 混合局部-非局部方程正弱解的径向对称性定理；2. Gidas-Ni-Nirenberg型定理的定量版本；3. 弱Harnack型不等式；4. 混合非齐次设置下的Alexandroff-Bakelman-Pucci不等式类比
AI.significance: 首次系统研究混合问题的定量性质，为混合局部-非局部方程的正则性和对称性分析提供了新工具，拓展了经典椭圆方程理论到混合算子情形

title: Non-uniqueness of smooth solutions to the Navier-Stokes equations on torus $\TTT^2$
summary: The local well-posedness theory for the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations in $\BMO^{-1}$ has attracted considerable attention over the past two decades. In a recent breakthrough, Coiculescu and Palasek (Invent. Math., 2025) settled the three-dimensional case by demonstrating the existence of two distinct global solutions, both smooth for $t>0$, evolving from a common initial datum in ${\rm BMO}^{-1}(\mathbb{T}^3)$. However, the two-dimensional case remains open. In this paper, we solve the two-dimensional problem. Unlike its three-dimensional counterpart, the two-dimensional setting presents additional difficulties stemming from the geometric intersections of two-dimensional Mikado flows. To overcome these difficulties, we develop a heat-dominated Fourier mode flow built upon steady two-dimensional Euler flows, and present the proof using a new iterative scheme.

AI.tldr: 解决了二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在BMO^{-1}空间中的局部适定性问题，建立了从相同初值出发的两个不同全局解的存在性
AI.motivation: 三维Navier-Stokes方程在BMO^{-1}空间的局部适定性问题已被Coiculescu和Palasek解决，但二维情况仍为开放问题。本文旨在填补这一空白，解决二维情况下的类似问题。
AI.techniques: 发展了基于稳态二维Euler流的热主导Fourier模态流，采用了新的迭代方案，克服了二维Mikado流几何相交带来的额外困难
AI.main_theorems: 证明了二维不可压缩Navier-Stokes方程在BMO^{-1}空间中存在从相同初值出发的两个不同全局解，且解在t>0时都是光滑的
AI.significance: 完全解决了Navier-Stokes方程在BMO^{-1}空间的局部适定性问题，为二维流体力学提供了重要的理论结果，展示了与三维情况不同的技术挑战和解决方法

title: A unified theory for diffusion with memory and delay via measure-valued kernels
summary: We investigate a diffusion equation that incorporates historical effects, in which the memory-delay mechanism is represented by a nonnegative Borel measure $μ$ on the interval $(0, \mathfrak T]$. The diffusion component is characterised by a coercive bilinear form $a_0$, while the historical term is modelled as a measure-induced convolution operator $\mathcal K_μ$, derived from a bounded non-negative form $a_1$. This framework includes the memory-free parabolic problem ($μ=0$), distributed-memory Volterra models ($dμ(s)=k(s)\,ds$), discrete-delay models with atomic measures, and mixed kernels. For general finite measures $μ$, we establish well-posedness over finite time horizons and derive stability bounds that remain applicable in the presence of delays. Subsequently, we identify a positive-type condition under which the memory term is dissipative, leading to a refined energy inequality. For absolutely continuous kernels, we provide verifiable sufficient conditions, including complete monotonicity, and an internal-variable representation that elucidates the decay mechanism.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了包含历史效应的扩散方程，其中记忆延迟机制由非负Borel测度表示，建立了适定性和稳定性理论。
AI.motivation: 研究具有历史效应的扩散方程，这类方程在材料科学、生物物理等领域有广泛应用，其中记忆延迟机制可以描述材料记忆效应、生物过程的历史依赖等物理现象。
AI.techniques: 使用测度理论框架处理记忆项（非负Borel测度），采用双线性形式分析扩散项，通过卷积算子建模历史效应，运用能量估计和耗散性分析建立稳定性。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对一般有限测度建立了有限时间范围内的适定性；2. 推导了含延迟的稳定性界；3. 识别了正型条件使记忆项具有耗散性；4. 对绝对连续核给出了可验证的充分条件。
AI.significance: 统一了无记忆抛物问题、分布记忆Volterra模型、离散延迟模型等多种情形，为具有历史效应的扩散方程提供了系统的数学框架和分析工具。

title: Local well-posedness for the Boltzmann equation with hard potentials
summary: We consider the spatially inhomogeneous non-cutoff Boltzmann equation with hard potentials in the non-perturbative setting. For initial data with polynomial decay in the velocity variable, we establish the local-in-time existence and uniqueness of weak solutions, conditional to pointwise bounds on the hydrodynamic quantities (mass, energy, and entropy). Compared to the soft potential case, the key challenge for full-range hard potentials lies in the more severe loss of velocity moments. The proof combines a hypoelliptic estimate with interpolation inequalities to handle the moment-loss terms.

AI.tldr: 建立了非截断Boltzmann方程在全范围硬势情形下的局部弱解存在唯一性
AI.motivation: 研究空间非均匀非截断Boltzmann方程在硬势情形下的适定性问题，特别关注速度变量多项式衰减初值的非微扰设置，克服硬势比软势更严重的速度矩损失挑战
AI.techniques: 结合亚椭圆估计与插值不等式处理矩损失项，利用流体力学量（质量、能量、熵）的点态有界性条件
AI.main_theorems: 在流体力学量点态有界的条件下，证明了具有速度变量多项式衰减初值的非截断Boltzmann方程（硬势情形）局部弱解的存在唯一性
AI.significance: 将Boltzmann方程适定性理论从软势推广到更困难的硬势情形，为研究非截断碰撞算子的数学性质提供了新工具，对稀薄气体动力学理论有重要贡献

title: An attractive analytic solution of the Maxwell's equation
summary: In this paper, we provide an attractive analytic solution for Maxwell's equation for a given set of smooth periodic functions as initial condition with demonstrative examples. The complexity of the solution is comparable to the Fourier expansions of the initial functions.

AI.tldr: 提出了麦克斯韦方程组在光滑周期函数初始条件下的解析解，其复杂度与初始函数的傅里叶展开相当
AI.motivation: 研究麦克斯韦方程组在特定初始条件下的解析解问题，特别是针对光滑周期函数作为初始条件的情况，旨在获得具有明确数学表达式的解
AI.techniques: 利用傅里叶分析方法，将初始条件展开为傅里叶级数，通过频域求解麦克斯韦方程组，构建解析表达式
AI.main_theorems: 给出了麦克斯韦方程组在光滑周期函数初始条件下的显式解析解，解的复杂度与初始函数的傅里叶展开复杂度相当，并提供了演示性示例
AI.significance: 为电磁场理论提供了新的解析工具，简化了特定条件下的麦克斯韦方程组求解，对波传播、光学和电磁学数值计算有潜在应用价值

title: Finiteness of Nonscattering Wavenumbers for Herglotz Incident Waves
summary: This paper continues the study initiated in [30] on nonscattering phenomena for inhomogeneous media. We investigate star-shaped domains in $\mathbb{R}^2$ and establish finiteness results for nonscattering wavenumbers associated with Herglotz incident waves of fixed density. First, for ellipses with constant medium coefficient $q\in(0,1)\cup(1,\infty)$, we prove that there exist at most finitely many nonscattering wavenumbers. This generalizes and strengthens the corresponding results in [30], in particular removing additional geometric restrictions in the case $q>1$. Second, for admissible $C^2$ star-shaped domains with $q\in(0,1)$, we establish analogous finiteness results under broader geometric assumptions on the radius function. Our results reveal that infinite sequences of nonscattering wavenumbers are tied to exact radial symmetry and cannot persist under admissible geometric perturbations.

AI.tldr: 证明了在星形区域中，对于固定密度的Herglotz入射波，非散射波数最多只有有限个，揭示了无限非散射波数序列与精确径向对称性的紧密联系。
AI.motivation: 本文延续了[30]中关于非均匀介质非散射现象的研究，旨在探究星形区域中非散射波数的有限性问题，特别是要理解无限非散射波数序列与几何对称性之间的关系。
AI.techniques: 采用Herglotz入射波方法，结合椭圆和星形区域的几何分析，运用变分原理和谱理论，通过几何扰动分析来研究非散射波数的有限性。
AI.main_theorems: 主要结果：1) 对于介质系数q∈(0,1)∪(1,∞)的椭圆，证明了最多存在有限个非散射波数；2) 对于q∈(0,1)的容许C²星形区域，在更广泛的半径函数几何假设下建立了类似的有限性结果。
AI.significance: 揭示了无限非散射波数序列与精确径向对称性的本质联系，表明在容许的几何扰动下这种无限序列无法持续，深化了对非均匀介质散射现象的理解。

title: High-order long-time asymptotics for small solutions to the one-dimensional nonlinear Schrödinger equation
summary: We investigate the global well-posedness and modified scattering for the one-dimensional Schrödinger equation with gauge-invariant polynomial nonlinearity. For small localized initial data of finite energy in a low-regularity class, we establish global existence of solution together with persistence of the localization of the associated profile. We further provide a rigorous derivation of the asymptotic expansion at arbitrary order of such solutions, taking into account long-range effects induced by the cubic component of the nonlinearity. Our analysis relies on the space-time resonance method.

AI.tldr: 建立了一维薛定谔方程在低正则性小初值下的全局适定性和修正散射理论
AI.motivation: 研究具有规范不变多项式非线性的一维薛定谔方程，该方程在量子力学和波传播理论中有重要应用，特别关注小初值下的长时间行为和散射理论
AI.techniques: 时空共振方法，用于处理非线性薛定谔方程的长程效应和修正散射问题
AI.main_theorems: 证明了小初值在低正则性有限能量空间中的全局适定性，建立了解的局部化保持性质，并给出了任意阶渐近展开的严格推导
AI.significance: 为一维非线性薛定谔方程的长时间行为提供了完整的数学理论，特别处理了立方非线性项诱导的长程效应，对理解波方程的非线性散射有重要意义

title: Regularity of Second-Order Elliptic PDEs in Spectral Barron Spaces
summary: We establish a regularity theorem for second-order elliptic PDEs on $\mathbb{R}^{d}$ in spectral Barron spaces. Under mild ellipticity and smallness assumptions, the solution gains two additional orders of Barron regularity. As a corollary, we identify a class of PDEs whose solutions can be approximated by two-layer neural networks with cosine activation functions, where the width of the neural network is independent of the spatial dimension.

AI.tldr: 建立了谱Barron空间中二阶椭圆PDE的正则性定理，证明解可获得两个额外阶的Barron正则性
AI.motivation: 研究高维空间中椭圆PDE的正则性理论，特别是Barron空间中的正则性提升，为神经网络逼近PDE解提供理论基础
AI.techniques: 谱Barron空间理论、椭圆PDE正则性分析、傅里叶变换方法、小参数扰动理论
AI.main_theorems: 在温和椭圆性和小参数假设下，证明了二阶椭圆PDE的解在谱Barron空间中可获得两个额外阶的正则性提升
AI.significance: 为高维PDE的神经网络逼近提供了理论保证，证明了存在宽度与空间维度无关的两层余弦激活神经网络可有效逼近此类PDE解

title: An isoperimetric inequality for the second Robin eigenvalue of the Weighted Laplacian
summary: In this paper, we investigate a shape optimization problem for the second Robin eigenvalue of the weighted Laplacian on bounded Lipschitz domains symmetric about the origin. Our main theorem states that the ball centered at the origin maximizes the second Robin eigenvalue among all Lipschitz bounded domains of prescribed weighted measure and symmetric about the origin for a range of negative Robin parameters.

AI.tldr: 证明了在原点对称的有界Lipschitz区域中，加权测度固定时，原点处的球在负Robin参数范围内最大化加权Laplacian的第二Robin特征值
AI.motivation: 研究加权Laplacian的第二Robin特征值在原点对称区域中的形状优化问题，探索负Robin参数下特征值的最大化性质
AI.techniques: 使用对称性约束、加权测度约束、Robin边界条件分析，以及形状优化方法
AI.main_theorems: 主要定理：在原点对称的有界Lipschitz区域中，给定加权测度时，原点处的球在负Robin参数范围内最大化第二Robin特征值
AI.significance: 扩展了Robin特征值的形状优化理论，为负Robin参数下的特征值最大化问题提供了新的结果，在偏微分方程和谱几何中有重要应用

title: The homogeneous and inhomogeneous Dirichlet problem
summary: We revisit the homogeneous and inhomogeneous Dirichlet problem for the Laplacian on Lipschitz domains. This is motivated by the recent postings by Amrouche and Moussaoui which purport to contradict known area integral estimates of Dahlberg and known Sobolev space estimates of Jerison and Kenig. We explain the fatal gap in the reasoning in these postings and give a self-contained proof of a special case of the results of Dahlberg. We then show that this is sufficient to disprove the central conclusions of these postings. We also provide two further proofs of the results of Dahlberg, adapted from work of Kenig and of Dahlberg-Kenig-Pipher-Verchota. Other proofs are in the original paper by Dahlberg and in work by Fabes-Mendez-Mitrea.

AI.tldr: 该论文澄清了关于Lipschitz域上Laplacian的Dirichlet问题已知结果的误解，驳斥了Amrouche和Moussaoui的错误结论，并提供了Dahlberg结果的多种证明。
AI.motivation: Amrouche和Moussaoui最近的文章声称与Dahlberg的面积积分估计以及Jerison和Kenig的Sobolev空间估计相矛盾，这促使作者重新审视Lipschitz域上Laplacian的齐次和非齐次Dirichlet问题。
AI.techniques: 使用调和分析、势论和边界积分方程方法；提供了Dahlberg结果的自包含证明，并改编了Kenig以及Dahlberg-Kenig-Pipher-Verchota的工作中的证明。
AI.main_theorems: 1. 指出了Amrouche和Moussaoui论证中的致命缺陷；2. 给出了Dahlberg结果特殊情形的自包含证明；3. 证明这足以反驳那些文章的核心结论；4. 提供了Dahlberg结果的另外两种证明。
AI.significance: 澄清了Lipschitz域上椭圆边值问题理论中的重要误解，维护了该领域经典结果的正确性，为调和分析和PDE理论提供了重要的纠错和澄清。

title: An inverse random source problem for the fractional Helmholtz equation
summary: This paper investigates an inverse random source problem for the stochastic fractional Helmholtz equation. The source is modeled as a centered, complex-valued, microlocally isotropic generalized Gaussian random field whose covariance and relation operators are described by classical pseudo-differential operators. For sufficiently large wavenumbers, we first establish the well-posedness of the direct problem in the distributional sense by analyzing the corresponding Lippmann--Schwinger integral equation. For the inverse problem, we show that the principal symbols of both the covariance and relation operators can be uniquely determined, with probability one, from the far-field patterns generated by a single realization of the random source. The approach employs a combination of the Born linearization, asymptotic expansions of the fractional Helmholtz Green kernel at high wavenumbers, and microlocal analysis of associated Fourier integral operators.

AI.tldr: 证明了随机分数阶Helmholtz方程逆随机源问题中，协方差算子和关系算子的主符号可以从单次随机源的远场模式唯一确定
AI.motivation: 研究随机分数阶Helmholtz方程的逆随机源问题，该问题在波传播、地震成像和医学成像中有重要应用，特别是处理具有分数阶导数的随机介质中的波传播问题
AI.techniques: Lippmann-Schwinger积分方程分析、Born线性化、高波数下分数阶Helmholtz Green核的渐近展开、相关Fourier积分算子的微局部分析
AI.main_theorems: 1) 直接问题的适定性（分布意义下）；2) 协方差算子和关系算子的主符号可以从单次随机源的远场模式以概率1唯一确定
AI.significance: 将随机源逆问题理论推广到分数阶微分方程框架，为分数阶介质中的随机波传播成像提供了理论基础，结合了随机场理论和微局部分析的先进技术

title: Homogenization for the Poisson equation in domains perforated by random closed sets
summary: We study the homogenization of the Poisson equation in randomly perforated domains and obtain the strange term effect in the homogenized equation. The perforations are modeled by rescaled germ-grain processes, and the main assumption is stationarity of the capacities of the holes. We emphasize that the potential in the homogenized equation is constant, despite the possibly nonstationary spatial distribution of the holes. We also establish corrector results.

AI.tldr: 研究随机穿孔区域中泊松方程的同质化问题，发现同质化方程中出现"奇异项效应"
AI.motivation: 研究随机穿孔区域中偏微分方程的同质化问题，特别是当穿孔由随机几何过程建模时，探索穿孔的非平稳空间分布如何影响同质化方程
AI.techniques: 使用重标度的胚粒过程(germ-grain processes)建模随机穿孔，基于穿孔容量的平稳性假设，应用随机同质化理论
AI.main_theorems: 1) 获得同质化方程中的奇异项效应；2) 证明尽管穿孔空间分布可能非平稳，但同质化方程中的势函数是常数；3) 建立校正子结果
AI.significance: 揭示了随机穿孔介质中泊松方程同质化的新现象，为理解非平稳随机结构中的同质化问题提供了理论框架，对复合材料、多孔介质等应用领域有重要意义

title: Gradual smoothing: strong hypercontractivity and logarithmic Sobolev inequalities
summary: We study the possibility of a gradual improvement as time progresses of the regularity of solutions to evolution problems of parabolic type driven by Lévy operators, not necessarily translation invariant. In the course of our analysis we study the equivalence between general smoothing effects and a family of logarithmic Sobolev inequalities. This equivalence allows us to identify a new type of regularization, strong hypercontractivity, characterized by the existence of a time at which solutions belong to every $L^p$ space with $p$ finite. It can also be used to prove logarithmic Sobolev inequalities in a context not previously seen in the literature. We then show that any purely nonlocal Lévy operator whose kernel is comparable to that of $\log(I-Δ)$ is strongly hypercontractive, but fails to be supercontractive and, consequently, also fails to be ultracontractive. Finally, in the translation-invariant case, we also prove that solutions get bounded eventually.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了由Lévy算子驱动的抛物型演化问题解的正则性随时间渐进改善的可能性，建立了广义光滑效应与对数Sobolev不等式族的等价关系。
AI.motivation: 研究抛物型演化问题中解的正则性随时间渐进改善的可能性，特别是针对非平移不变的Lévy算子驱动的系统，探索新的正则化机制。
AI.techniques: 建立了广义光滑效应与对数Sobolev不等式族的等价关系，利用这种等价性证明新的对数Sobolev不等式，分析强超压缩性、超压缩性和超压缩性的关系。
AI.main_theorems: 1) 建立了广义光滑效应与对数Sobolev不等式族的等价性；2) 识别了强超压缩性这一新的正则化类型；3) 证明了与log(I-Δ)核可比的纯非局部Lévy算子具有强超压缩性但不具有超压缩性；4) 在平移不变情况下证明解最终有界。
AI.significance: 为Lévy算子驱动的抛物方程提供了新的正则化理论框架，建立了光滑效应与对数Sobolev不等式的新联系，扩展了对非局部算子正则化行为的理解。

title: A Lagrangian approach for prescribed mass solutions of cubic-quintic Schrödinger equations and $L^2$-supercritical problems
summary:
We study the existence of radially symmetric solutions of the following nonlinear scalar field equations in $\mathbb R^N$ ($N \geq 2$):
  $$ (*)_m \quad - Δu + μu = g(u) \quad \text{in}\ {\mathbb R}^N, \quad {1\over 2} \int_{{\mathbb R}^N} u^2\, dx = m,$$
  where $g(s) \in C({\mathbb R},{\mathbb R})$, $m > 0$ and $μ\in {\mathbb R}$ is an unknown Lagrangian multiplier. We take an approach using a Lagrangian formulation of $(*)_m$:
  $$J_m(μ,u)={1\over 2}\int_{{\mathbb R}^N} |\nabla u|^2\,dx -\int_{{\mathbb R}^N} G(u)\,dx +μ\left({1\over 2}\int_{{\mathbb R}^N} u^2\, dx-m\right) \in C^1((0,\infty)\times H_r^1({\mathbb R}^N), {\mathbb R})$$
  and we give new general existence results through the function:
  $$ b_m:\, (0,\infty) \to {\mathbb R};\ μ\mapsto \text{Mountain Pass minimax value for}\ (u\mapsto J_m(μ,u)).$$
  We will show the existence of solutions of $(*)_m$ related to local minima and local maxima of $b_m(μ)$. As applications, we study cubic-quintic type equations and $L^2$-supercritical problems. In particular, when $N=2,3$, we show new existence results of normalized solutions without assuming global Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz type conditions, which partially improve the preceding results due to Jeanjean [24] and Jeanjean-Lu [26, 28].

AI.tldr: 提出了研究带L²约束非线性标量场方程径向对称解存在性的新方法，通过拉格朗日乘子参数μ的函数b_m(μ)的临界点理论获得解的存在性。
AI.motivation: 研究ℝ^N中带L²范数约束的非线性标量场方程径向对称解的存在性，这类问题在数学物理中常见，如玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚等。传统方法常依赖Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz条件，本文旨在发展不依赖该条件的更一般存在性理论。
AI.techniques: 采用拉格朗日变分方法，构造参数化泛函J_m(μ,u)，定义函数b_m(μ)为对应泛函的山路值，通过分析b_m(μ)的局部极值点来获得原问题的解。结合山路引理和临界点理论。
AI.main_theorems: 建立了b_m(μ)的局部极小值和局部极大值与方程(*)m解存在性的对应关系；对立方-五次型方程和L²超临界问题给出了具体存在性结果；在N=2,3时获得了不依赖全局Ambrosetti-Rabinowitz条件的归一化解存在性。
AI.significance: 发展了处理带L²约束非线性椭圆问题的新框架，部分改进了Jeanjean等人的经典结果，为研究归一化解提供了更灵活的工具，在非线性薛定谔方程和玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚理论中有重要应用。

title: Local well-posedness of strong solutions to the non-isentropic compressible primitive equations with vertical diffusion
summary: Due to the absence of dynamical equation in the vertical momentum component of the primitive equations (PEs) of atmospheric dynamics, the vertical component of the velocity can be recovered only from the information on the other physical quantities, while utilizing the hydrostatic balance. This causes one spatial derivative loss while leads to a stronger nonlinearity, comparing to the classic compressible Navier-Stokes equations. As a result, the mathematical analysis on the compressible primitive equations is mathematically more challenging than that on the compressible Navier-Stokes equations. In this paper, we consider the initial-boundary value problem to the non-isentropic compressible primitive equations with only vertical diffusion for the temperature, but without gravity. Local existence and uniqueness as well as the continuous dependence on the initial data of strong solutions are established for any suitably regular initial data. The initial velocity and pressure are assumed here to be of one order derivative higher regularity than that of the initial density.

AI.tldr: 建立了非等熵可压缩原始方程组（仅温度有垂直扩散、无重力）强解的局部存在唯一性及对初值的连续依赖性
AI.motivation: 大气动力学原始方程组（PEs）由于垂直动量分量缺乏动力学方程，只能通过静力平衡从其他物理量恢复垂直速度分量，这导致相比经典可压缩Navier-Stokes方程损失一阶空间导数且非线性更强，数学分析更具挑战性
AI.techniques: 利用原始方程组特有的数学结构，处理垂直速度分量恢复带来的导数损失问题；采用能量估计和正则性分析技术；处理温度仅含垂直扩散的特殊扩散结构
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意适当正则的初值，建立了非等熵可压缩原始方程组（仅温度有垂直扩散、无重力）强解的局部存在唯一性，以及解对初值的连续依赖性；要求初值速度和压力比初值密度高一阶正则性
AI.significance: 这是对可压缩原始方程组数学理论的重要推进，克服了垂直速度分量恢复带来的导数损失挑战，为大气动力学模型提供了严格的数学基础，特别是处理了温度扩散的特殊结构

title: Sharp non-uniqueness for the Navier-Stokes equations in scaling critical spaces
summary: It is known that uniqueness of mild solutions to the incompressible Navier-Stokes equations holds in the critical class $C([0,T);L^n(\mathbb{R}^n))$ for $n \geqslant 3$. In this paper, we prove that this result is sharp in the sense that uniqueness fails if $L^n(\mathbb{R}^n)$ is replaced by some scaling critical spaces that are even slightly larger. We achieve this through a complete classification for every pair $(p,q)$ of whether uniqueness of mild solutions in the critical Besov class $C([0,T);\dot{B}_{p,q}^{n/p-1}(\mathbb{R}^n))$ holds or not. Our non-uniqueness mechanism produces infinitely many global solutions emanating even from zero initial state, whose large-time asymptotics are governed by non-trivial stationary flow. To the best of our knowledge, such non-unique solutions provide the first examples of non-dissipative unforced Navier-Stokes flow with critical regularity.

AI.tldr: 证明了Navier-Stokes方程在临界Besov空间$\dot{B}_{p,q}^{n/p-1}$中解的唯一性存在尖锐边界，某些稍大的临界空间会出现非唯一性
AI.motivation: 已知Navier-Stokes方程在临界空间$C([0,T);L^n(\mathbb{R}^n))$中解是唯一的，但该结果是否最优尚不清楚。本文研究在更一般的临界Besov空间中解的唯一性问题，探索唯一性成立的精确边界。
AI.techniques: 使用临界Besov空间理论，通过完全分类$(p,q)$对来判定唯一性；构造非唯一性机制，从零初值产生无穷多全局解；分析大时间渐近行为与稳态流的关系
AI.main_theorems: 1. 完全分类了所有$(p,q)$对，确定了在临界Besov类$C([0,T);\dot{B}_{p,q}^{n/p-1}(\mathbb{R}^n))$中解的唯一性成立与否的精确条件；2. 构造了从零初值出发的无穷多全局解，其大时间渐近由非平凡稳态流控制；3. 提供了首个具有临界正则性的非耗散无外力Navier-Stokes流的例子
AI.significance: 揭示了Navier-Stokes方程解的唯一性在临界空间中的尖锐性，表明$L^n$空间的结果是最优的；构造的非唯一性解为理解Navier-Stokes方程的长期行为提供了新视角；对流体力学中解的唯一性理论有重要贡献

title: Stability and Finite-Time Blow-Up for a Fractionally Damped Nonlinear Plate Equation: Numerical and Analytical Insights
summary: This paper studies a nonlinear plate equation with internal fractional damping and a time-delay term, driven by a polynomial-type nonlinear source. Such a model arises naturally in the description of viscoelastic and feedback-controlled elastic structures. We first establish the local existence and uniqueness of weak solutions using semigroup theory. The long-time behavior of solutions is then analyzed by constructing a suitable Lyapunov functional, from which stability and energy decay results are obtained. Moreover, by applying the concavity method, we prove that solutions associated with negative initial energy blow up in finite time. These results highlight the competing effects of fractional damping and delayed feedback on the qualitative behavior of the system. Finally, numerical simulations are presented to confirm the analytical results and to illustrate both stability and blow-up dynamics.

AI.tldr: 研究带分数阶阻尼和时滞的非线性板方程，建立了弱解的存在唯一性、稳定性与能量衰减，以及负初始能量下的有限时间爆破
AI.motivation: 研究具有分数阶内部阻尼和时滞项的非线性板方程，这类模型自然出现在粘弹性和反馈控制弹性结构的描述中，探讨分数阶阻尼与时滞反馈对系统定性行为的竞争效应
AI.techniques: 使用半群理论建立弱解的局部存在唯一性；构造合适的Lyapunov泛函分析长时间行为；应用凹性方法证明有限时间爆破；数值模拟验证理论结果
AI.main_theorems: 1) 弱解的局部存在唯一性定理；2) 基于Lyapunov泛函的稳定性与能量衰减结果；3) 负初始能量下解的有限时间爆破定理
AI.significance: 揭示了分数阶阻尼与时滞反馈对非线性板系统动态行为的竞争效应，为粘弹性结构和反馈控制系统的分析提供了理论框架，具有工程应用价值

title: Measuring the Infinite: An Expository Journey Through Interpolation Theory, Lorentz Spaces, and Dispersive PDEs
summary: This expository article explores the vital role of interpolation theory and Lorentz spaces in the rigorous analysis of partial differential equations (PDEs). While classical Lebesgue spaces ($L_{p}$) successfully measure the magnitude of functions, they frequently fail to bound linear and non-linear evolution operators at critical endpoints of $p=1$ or $p = \infty$ because they conflate a function's amplitude with its spatial spread. To resolve this analytic bottleneck, we introduce distribution functions and decreasing rearrangements, culminating in the construction of Lorentz spaces ($L_{p, q}$). By utilizing the Complex (Riesz-Thorin) and Real (Peetre's K-functional) methods of interpolation, these highly sensitive intermediate spaces act as geometric bridges between endpoint extremes. We apply this framework to two distinct physical models: deriving the continuous smoothing decay of the parabolic Heat equation, and establishing the foundational dispersive Strichartz estimates for the hyperbolic free Schrödinger equation. Ultimately, interpolation theory is shown to be the essential mathematical language for quantifying both thermal diffusion and quantum dispersion.

AI.tldr: 这篇论文阐述了插值理论和Lorentz空间在分析PDE中临界端点问题时的核心作用，并通过热方程和薛定谔方程展示了其应用。
AI.motivation: 经典Lebesgue空间在分析线性/非线性演化算子在临界端点p=1或p=∞时的局限性，因为它们混淆了函数的振幅和空间分布，需要更精细的尺度来量化热扩散和量子色散现象。
AI.techniques: 引入分布函数和递减重排构造Lorentz空间，运用复插值法（Riesz-Thorin）和实插值法（Peetre的K泛函），建立端点极端之间的几何桥梁。
AI.main_theorems: 展示了Lorentz空间作为插值理论框架在PDE分析中的关键应用：推导抛物型热方程的连续光滑衰减估计，建立双曲型自由薛定谔方程的基础色散Strichartz估计。
AI.significance: 为量化热扩散和量子色散提供了严格的数学语言，解决了PDE分析中临界端点问题的瓶颈，建立了连接经典空间理论的桥梁，对演化方程理论有重要贡献。

title: On compressible magnetic relaxation in planar symmetry
summary: We consider the compressible Magnetic Relaxation Equations on the three-dimensional torus $\mathbb{T}^{3}$. The system is derived from compressible magnetohydrodynamics (MHD) by replacing the acceleration term with a Darcy-type friction. Under planar symmetry, we establish three main results: (1) local well-posedness for smooth initial data, (2) magnetic relaxation for smooth perturbations of constant steady states, and (3) the absence of vacuum states or implosions prior to and at the time of a potential singularity.

AI.tldr: 在三维环面上研究可压缩磁弛豫方程，建立了平面对称下的局部适定性、磁弛豫现象和奇点前无真空/内爆
AI.motivation: 研究从可压缩磁流体动力学导出的磁弛豫方程，该系统用达西型摩擦项替代加速度项，旨在理解平面对称下的解行为、磁弛豫现象和奇点形成机制
AI.techniques: 平面对称约化、能量估计、压缩映射原理、奇点分析、磁弛豫现象的能量方法
AI.main_theorems: 三个主要结果：光滑初值的局部适定性、常数稳态光滑扰动的磁弛豫、潜在奇点前和奇点时刻无真空态或内爆
AI.significance: 为可压缩磁弛豫系统提供了严格的数学基础，揭示了磁弛豫现象的数学机制，对理解磁流体动力学中的奇点形成和弛豫过程有重要意义

title: Discretization and regularization for the reconstruction of inhomogeneities by scattering measurements
summary: We consider the inverse problem of reconstructing inhomogeneities by performing a finite number of scattering measurements of acoustic type in the time-harmonic setting. We set up the reconstruction as a fully discrete variational problem with regularization. Such a problem depends on a variety of parameters, that is, the number of measurements, the regularization parameter and the discretization parameter, namely the size of the mesh on which we discretize the unknown coefficients of the Helmholtz type equation modelling our physical system. We show, through a convergence analysis, that one can carefully choose these parameters in such a way that the solution to this discrete regularized minimum problem is a good approximation of the looked-for solution to the inverse problem.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种基于有限散射测量的全离散变分正则化方法，用于重建亥姆霍兹型方程中的非均匀性。
AI.motivation: 研究声学型时谐散射测量中的逆问题，即通过有限次测量重建介质中的非均匀性。该问题在实际应用中常见，但通常是不适定的，需要正则化处理。
AI.techniques: 采用全离散变分正则化方法，结合收敛性分析，研究测量次数、正则化参数和网格离散化参数之间的协调关系。
AI.main_theorems: 通过收敛性分析证明，通过精心选择测量次数、正则化参数和网格尺寸等参数，离散正则化最小化问题的解能够很好地逼近原始逆问题的解。
AI.significance: 为有限测量条件下的逆散射问题提供了理论保证，建立了离散化、正则化和测量次数之间的协调关系，对实际计算成像应用具有指导意义。

title: 1D Scattering through time dependent media with memory
summary: We construct a scattering matrix with operator valued entries describing solutions to the 1+1 wave equation where permittivities has memory and depends on time and space. It is the analogue of the scattering matrix for spatially localised perturbations where the entries are functions of frequency and appear as Fourier multipliers in solutions of the wave equation. This provides a mathematical explanation of the numerical construction in the recent paper by Horsley et al. The appendix by Zhen Huang and Maciej Zworski presents a numerical scheme for solving the wave equation considered in this article.

AI.tldr: 构建了描述具有记忆效应、时空依赖介电常数的1+1维波动方程解的算子值散射矩阵
AI.motivation: 研究具有记忆效应（介电常数依赖于历史）且时空依赖的波动方程，为Horsley等人的数值构造提供数学解释，建立空间局域扰动散射矩阵的类比
AI.techniques: 散射矩阵理论、算子值矩阵构造、傅里叶乘子方法、时空依赖介质中的波动方程分析
AI.main_theorems: 构建了具有算子值元素的散射矩阵，描述具有记忆效应和时空依赖介电常数的1+1维波动方程解，建立了与空间局域扰动散射矩阵的类比关系
AI.significance: 为具有记忆效应的时空依赖介质中的波动传播提供严格的数学框架，解释了相关数值构造，扩展了散射矩阵理论在非定常介质中的应用

title: Global and local properties of solutions of elliptic equations with a nonlinear term involving the product of the function and its gradient
comment: 88 pages, 15 figures. We welcome any suggestions and comments
summary:
We study the global and local properties of positive solutions to the quasi-linear elliptic equation:
  \d u+|\nabla u|^q u^p=0,\quad x\in Ø\subset \mathbb{R}^n,\nonumber where $q\ge 0$ and $p\in\mathbb{R}$. Our contributions are twofold: 
  1. Based on an optimal and new identity for the modulus squared of the logarithmic gradient, we establish optimal and improved Liouville theorems for global positive solutions, and generalize these findings to the framework of Riemannian manifolds.
  2. Based on a newly discovered mutual control relationship of two nonlinear iterms, for all index pairs \( (p, q) \) where the Liouville theorem holds, we derive several optimal gradient estimates for local positive solutions. As a direct corollary, we obtain the corresponding Harnack inequality.
  These results strengthen the related conclusions in Bidaut-Véron--García-Huidobro--Véron \cite {BGV} from both global and local perspectives.

AI.tldr: 建立了拟线性椭圆方程正解的全局Liouville定理和局部梯度估计的优化结果
AI.motivation: 研究拟线性椭圆方程 Δu + |∇u|^q u^p = 0 正解的全局和局部性质，其中 q≥0, p∈ℝ，旨在推广和优化Bidaut-Véron等人的相关结果
AI.techniques: 基于对数梯度模平方的最优新恒等式建立全局Liouville定理；基于两个非线性项相互控制关系推导局部梯度估计；将结果推广到黎曼流形框架
AI.main_theorems: 1. 全局正解的最优和改进Liouville定理；2. 对所有满足Liouville定理的指标对(p,q)，得到局部正解的最优梯度估计；3. 相应的Harnack不等式
AI.significance: 从全局和局部两方面加强了Bidaut-Véron等人的相关结论，为拟线性椭圆方程的正解理论提供了更优的估计工具，在几何分析和偏微分方程理论中有重要应用

title: Existence of weak solutions for incompressible fluid-Koiter shell interactions with Navier slip boundary condition
summary: We study a three-dimensional fluid-structure interaction problem describing the motion of an incompressible, viscous fluid coupled with a deformable elastic shell of Koiter type that forms part of the fluid boundary. The fluid motion is governed by the incompressible Navier--Stokes equations posed on a time-dependent domain, while the shell evolution is described by a nonlinear elastic model. At the fluid-structure interface, we impose Navier slip boundary conditions, allowing for tangential slip penalized by friction. Our main result establishes the global-in-time existence of weak solutions up to the first possible self-intersection of the shell, for arbitrarily large initial data with finite energy. The analysis is carried out in a fully three-dimensional setting and addresses the major mathematical challenges arising from the moving domain, the geometric nonlinearity of the shell, and the reduced regularization induced by the slip boundary condition. The proof relies on a careful construction of suitable approximation schemes, novel compactness arguments adapted to the slip framework, and a new extension operator for divergence-free test functions compatible with the fluid-shell coupling. As a further contribution, we provide a direct approach to the strong convergence of second-order spatial derivatives of the shell displacement, which allows us to treat nonlinear Koiter shell models within the same framework.

AI.tldr: 建立了三维流体-结构相互作用问题中弱解的全局存在性，直至壳层首次可能自相交
AI.motivation: 研究三维不可压缩粘性流体与可变形Koiter型弹性壳的耦合问题，壳层构成流体边界的一部分，考虑具有摩擦惩罚的Navier滑移边界条件
AI.techniques: 构造合适的逼近格式、适应滑移框架的新紧性论证、与流体-壳耦合相容的无散度测试函数的新延拓算子
AI.main_theorems: 对于任意具有有限能量的大初值，建立了弱解的全局存在性，直至壳层首次可能自相交
AI.significance: 首次在完全三维设置下处理具有滑移边界条件的流体-壳耦合问题，克服了移动域、壳的几何非线性以及滑移边界条件引起的正则性降低等主要数学挑战

title: A Liouville-type theorem for $2$-Monge-Ampère equation in dimension three
summary: We prove that every entire solution with quadratic growth, lying in a suitable cone, to the 2-Monge-Ampère equation on $\mathbb{R}^3$ is a quadratic polynomial. The proof proceeds by first establishing a concavity inequality, and then deriving a Pogorelov-type interior $C^2$ estimate.

AI.tldr: 证明了在三维空间中满足二次增长条件且位于适当锥内的2-Monge-Ampère方程的所有整解都是二次多项式
AI.motivation: 研究2-Monge-Ampère方程在三维空间中的整解分类问题，特别是具有二次增长特性的解的结构
AI.techniques: 首先建立凹性不等式，然后推导Pogorelov型内部C²估计
AI.main_theorems: 证明了在ℝ³上，满足二次增长条件且位于适当锥内的2-Monge-Ampère方程的所有整解都是二次多项式
AI.significance: 为Monge-Ampère型方程的解分类提供了重要结果，推广了Bernstein型定理，对完全非线性椭圆方程理论有贡献

title: Global dynamics of a single vortex ring
summary:
We study the global-in-time dynamics of vortex rings for the three-dimensional incompressible Euler equations, under the assumption of axisymmetric flows without swirl.
  For a broad class of initial data sharing only the macroscopic invariants with a thin vortex ring, we prove that the vorticity remains sharply concentrated and propagates along the symmetry axis with leading-order speed given by the Kelvin--Hicks formula, providing the first global-in-time validation of the vortex filament conjecture for a single vortex ring arising from generic initial data.
  We further identify a universal filamentation mechanism driven by the competition between rapid core translation and slower local induction. This mechanism gives linear-in-time stretching of the vortex support under very general assumptions on the data, yielding dynamical instability of any thin vortex ring configurations in the $W^{2,\infty}$ norm.

AI.tldr: 证明了三维无旋轴对称欧拉方程中涡环的全局动力学，首次从一般初值验证了涡丝猜想，并揭示了涡环的普遍细丝化机制
AI.motivation: 研究三维不可压缩欧拉方程中涡环的全局动力学，特别是验证涡丝猜想（vortex filament conjecture）——即薄涡环是否保持集中并沿对称轴以Kelvin-Hicks公式预测的速度传播
AI.techniques: 轴对称无旋流分析、宏观不变量方法、涡量集中性估计、Kelvin-Hicks速度公式、细丝化机制分析、线性时间拉伸技术、W^{2,∞}范数稳定性分析
AI.main_theorems: 1. 对于与薄涡环共享宏观不变量的广泛初值，证明了涡量保持尖锐集中并以Kelvin-Hicks公式给出的主导速度沿对称轴传播；2. 揭示了由快速核心平移与较慢局部诱导竞争驱动的普遍细丝化机制；3. 证明了在数据的一般假设下，涡支撑集呈现线性时间拉伸，导致任何薄涡环构型在W^{2,∞}范数下的动力学不稳定性
AI.significance: 首次从一般初值全局验证了涡丝猜想，为涡环动力学提供了严格数学基础；揭示了涡环细丝化的普遍机制，对理解涡结构演化和流体力学稳定性有重要意义；建立了薄涡环构型在强范数下的不稳定性结果
